title: Toe Touch Stretch
description: Stand up and slowly bend forward to touch your toes. Hold for 10 seconds, then slowly rise back up.

title: Shoulder Rolls
description: Roll your shoulders forward 10 times, then backward 10 times. Keep movements slow and controlled.

title: Window Gaze
description: Walk to the window and look at something far away for 20 seconds. This helps relax your eye muscles.

title: Overhead Stretch
description: Raise both arms overhead, interlace your fingers, and stretch upward. Hold for 15 seconds.

title: Side Stretch
description: Raise one arm overhead and lean to the opposite side. Hold for 10 seconds, then switch sides.

title: Neck Circles
description: Slowly rotate your head in a circle, 5 times clockwise and 5 times counterclockwise.

title: Quad Stretch
description: Stand on one leg, grab your opposite foot behind you, and pull your heel toward your glute. Hold 15 seconds each side.

title: Wrist Rotations
description: Extend your arms and rotate your wrists in circles, 10 times in each direction.

title: Walk Around the Room
description: Take a short walk around your room or office. Move your legs and get your blood flowing.

title: Deep Breathing
description: Take 5 deep breaths: inhale for 4 seconds, hold for 4 seconds, exhale for 4 seconds.

title: Calf Raises
description: Stand and slowly rise onto your toes, then lower back down. Repeat 15 times.

title: Shoulder Shrugs
description: Raise your shoulders up toward your ears, hold for 3 seconds, then release. Repeat 10 times.

title: Eye Rest
description: Close your eyes gently and relax. Let your eye muscles rest completely for 20 seconds.

title: Standing Squats
description: Do 10 slow bodyweight squats. Keep your back straight and knees behind your toes.

title: Finger Stretches
description: Spread your fingers wide, hold for 5 seconds, then make a fist. Repeat 8 times.

title: Hamstring Stretch
description: Place one foot on a low surface, keep your leg straight, and lean forward. Hold 15 seconds each side.

title: Posture Check
description: Stand against a wall with your head, shoulders, and hips touching it. Hold this posture for 15 seconds.

title: Water Break
description: Walk to the kitchen and drink a full glass of water. Staying hydrated improves focus.

title: Arm Circles
description: Extend your arms to the sides and make small circles, gradually increasing size. 10 forward, 10 backward.

title: Box Breathing
description: Breathe in for 4 seconds, hold for 4 seconds, breathe out for 4 seconds, hold for 4 seconds. Repeat 3 times.

title: Chest Opener
description: Clasp your hands behind your back, straighten your arms, and lift them slightly while opening your chest.

title: Take the Stairs
description: If stairs are nearby, walk up and down one flight. A quick burst of activity boosts energy.

title: 20-20-20 Rule
description: Look at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds. This reduces digital eye strain significantly.

title: Hip Circles
description: Place your hands on your hips and rotate them in wide circles. 10 clockwise, 10 counterclockwise.

title: Spinal Twist
description: Sit or stand, place one hand on the opposite knee, and gently twist your torso. Hold 10 seconds each side.
